synopsis: FORNAX — metallic mountain world: a colossal super-earth with towering, metallic-mineral mountain ranges shrouded in a dense, ochre atmosphere; signature = a vast, glowing atmospheric compression wave rippling through a valley between colossal, iron-rich peaks.
narration: Fornax is a super-earth of unimaginable density and scale, its surface dominated by colossal metallic-mineral mountains. From orbit, its ochre atmosphere swirls around peaks that scratch the heavens. As we pierce the heavy, turbulent air, the sheer magnitude of these iron-rich giants becomes clear. Gravitational forces create unique phenomena; we witness a silent compression wave, a glowing ripple of pure atmospheric power, coursing through a valley between these titanic, ancient peaks.

shots.prompt: A colossal, dense-looking super-earth, deep ochre and bronze in color. Incredibly sharp, metallic-looking mountain ranges are visible through gaps in the swirling, heavy atmosphere, hinting at immense scale and density.

Rapid descent through an extremely dense, turbulent, ochre-colored atmosphere. The air feels heavy, creating shimmering distortions. Distant, impossibly tall, dark metallic peaks begin to emerge from the haze below, their surfaces glinting faintly.

Flying low between gargantuan, dark iron-rich peaks that scrape the upper atmosphere. The air shimmers with gravitational distortions, and faint, glowing atmospheric currents are visible, hugging the immense, sheer rock faces.

The camera drifts into a vast, deep canyon between two titanic metallic mountains. A colossal, slow-moving wave of super-dense, glowing atmospheric compression moves silently through the canyon, creating shimmering light and profound pressure before gently dissipating around the camera, revealing the immense scale of the peaks.
